meta.title: Elenita's Cats — Cats, Roblox & K-Pop in Manga Style
meta.description: Official Elenita's Cats website. Short cat videos, Roblox, funny animals and K-pop in an interactive webtoon style!

chapter1.label: CHAPTER 1
chapter1.title: Meet Elenita
chapter1.bio: Hey! I'm Elenita! I love cats, play Roblox, and adore K-pop — especially ILLIT and BLACKPINK. On my channel you'll find short, funny videos with my furry friends, Roblox adventures, and reactions to Korean music!
